steps.title: Find the adjacent angle
steps.content:
Since $T$ lies on segment $SW$, angles $STU$ and $UTW$ form a linear pair. Thus, the measure of angle $UTW$ is found from
$$
74^\circ+x=180^\circ
$$
so $x=106^\circ$.

steps.title: Use the parallel segments
steps.content: Because segment $TU$ is parallel to segment $VW$, alternate interior angles formed by transversal $TV$ are congruent. The figure gives the matching angle as $26^\circ$, so $r=26$.

steps.title: Subtract the labels
steps.content: The figure labels $p$ as the angle with measure $106^\circ$, so $$ p-r=106-26=80 $$ The answer is 80.
